headline: Turkey Data Center Market Investment Analysis Report 2026-2031 Featuring COMnet Solutions, DataCasa, Equinix, NGN, PenDC, Radore, Sadece Hosting, Sparkle, Telehouse, Turk Telekom, Turkcell, Vodafone
summary: The Turkey Data Center Market is poised for significant growth, with a projection to escalate from USD 715 Million in 2025 to USD 1.79 Billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 16.56%. Key insights reveal Istanbul as a central data hub with 21 active centers and two more planned. The market thrives on the country's Renewable Energy 2035 Strategy focusing on wind and solar energy. summary: The South Africa Data Center Market is set to grow from USD 2.55 billion in 2025 to USD 5.28 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 12.90%. headline: U.S. Data Center Construction Market Outlook Report 2026-2031 Featuring Key Investors - Apple, Applied Digital, AWS, CyrusOne, DataBank, Digital Realty, Equinix, Google, Meta, Microsoft, NTT, Vantage
summary: The U.S. Data Center Construction Market is set to grow from USD 83.97 billion in 2025 to USD 154.49 billion by 2031, accelerating at a CAGR of 10.70%. headline: Oman Data Center Investment Analysis & Growth Report 2026: A $492 Million Market by 2031 Featuring Key DC Investors - Cloud Acropolis, DATAMOUNT, Equinix, Oman Data Park, Ooredoo Oman
summary: The Oman Data Center Market is poised for significant growth, projected to rise from USD 288 million in 2025 to USD 492 million by 2031, at a CAGR of 9.34%.
